title: Der Luftpirat und sein lenkbares Luftschiff 42: Im Todeskrater des neuen Planeten
summaries: "Der Luftpirat und sein lenkbares Luftschiff 42: Im Todeskrater des neuen…" is a German science fiction dime novel series published from 1908 to around 1911/12. The series follows Captain Mors, a masked aviator who pilots an airship and a space-capable vehicle called the Meteor. After his family is murdered by revolutionaries in Georgia, Mors wages a vengeful campaign against criminals and anarchists across Earth and beyond. With his Indian crew, he explores inhabited worlds including the Moon, Venus, and Mars, encountering alien civilizations and interplanetary conflicts. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
